learning.concept: There are two main types: Low-level and High-level languages.
learning.explanation:
### Low-Level
* Close to machine hardware
* Fast but very hard for humans to understand

### High-Level
* Easy for humans to read/write
* Used for real-world apps, AI, and games

analogy.title: Talking to Machines
analogy.body:
Low-level = Talking in machine codes (binary)
High-level = Talking in English-like syntax

👉 Python is a high-level language.

practice.q: Why do beginners use high-level languages?
practice.a: They focus more on logic and less on hardware details.
